name: Nondairy Avocado "Sour Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine all ingredients except the herbs.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Stir in the chopped dill weed, chives, and garlic chives.
4. Serve. Great on top of potatoes or with raw vegetables, vegetable burritos, tacos, or scrambled tofu - anywhere you might use sour cream.
Attribution:
Source: Liz Lugan - Clawson, Michigan
The Herb Companion - February/March 1993
